International.body: Sevdalinka or Balkan Blues a love song of Bosnia gets UNESCO ICH recognition.
Indonesia Joins BRICS as 10th Full Member (Hq - Shanghai)
Nigeria Joined BRICS as the 9th Partner Country
WHO Declares Georgia as the 45th Malaria-Free Country
Guinea eradicated the gambiense form of Human African Trypanosomiasis (HAT) as a public health issue.
HAT or sleeping sickness, is a vector-borne parasitic disease endemic in sub-Saharan Africa.
WHO Declares Niger as the 1st Country in Africa to Eliminate Onchocerciasis aka River Blindness
It is a parasitic disease caused by the Onchocerca volvulus parasite (infected black flie) specially in river areas.
Onchocerciasis is the 2nd leading infectious cause of blindness worldwide, after trachoma.
Mali, Burkina Faso & Niger Officially Withdraw from - Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS)

Shahid Bagheri - Iran's 1st drone carrier warship.
Chang’e-8 is a planned Chinese lunar mission partner with Pax set for 2028, focusing on exploring the Moon’s south pole.

WHO: Rubella Eliminated as a Public Health Problem in Nepal
Rubella, commonly known as German Measles, poses serious risks to pregnant women
it can lead to a range of birth defects like: deafness, cardiac defects, cataracts, and neurologic impairment.
